close_reason: Implemented fail-fast re-entrancy guard via ClientUsageError; wrapped stream/COPY callbacks and added regressions (client_wbtest + integration tests).
description: Callbacks passed to RowStream::for_each, Client::copy_out handler, and Client::copy_in writer currently execute while operation_guard is held. If callback code issues another DB operation on the same Client, it can self-deadlock waiting for the same lock. Add a fail-fast re-entrancy guard and tests.
title: Fail fast on re-entrant client usage inside stream/COPY callbacks

close_reason: Added security comment
description: connection.mbt generate_nonce() seeds ChaCha8 with @async.now() timestamp, which is predictable. Add a clear comment flagging this limitation for future improvement when OS-level CSPRNG becomes available in MoonBit.
title: Add security comment for SCRAM nonce entropy limitation

close_reason: Extracted with_flag helper
description: Both methods in client.mbt are structurally identical: set a boolean flag, run callback, unset flag on success/error. Extract a single generic with_flag helper to eliminate the duplication (~15 lines).
title: Consolidate run_user_callback and run_transaction_callback

close_reason: Closed
description: Add/update unit tests covering: Value type conversion round-trips, split_string edge cases, parse_affected_rows, NotificationQueue operations, PreparedStatement close paths, RowStream lifecycle, SCRAM constant-time comparison. Ensure no regressions from the refactoring.
title: Add comprehensive unit tests for refactored code

close_reason: Single try/catch with release_locks() helper
description: stream.mbt RowStream::close has 5 nearly identical catch blocks each doing operation_guard.release(), lock_held=false, release_tx_guard(), raise err. Wrap in a single try block with one cleanup handler (~30 lines saved).
title: Simplify RowStream::close repetitive error cleanup

close_reason: In-place shift replaces double-copy
description: connection.mbt compact_if_needed copies remaining items into compacted array, clears self.items, then copies back from compacted. Should just replace self.items with compacted directly (like Decoder does).
title: Fix NotificationQueue::compact_if_needed double-copy

close_reason: Inlined backwards scan, eliminated both helper functions
description: split_string is defined in both client.mbt (skips empty parts) and internal/protocol/scram.mbt (preserves empty parts). parse_int_simple in client.mbt duplicates parse_int in types.mbt. Consolidate to single implementations.
title: Deduplicate split_string and parse_int_simple functions

close_reason: All child hardening, performance, and consolidation tasks completed and validated with targeted checks/tests
description: Implements the architecture/performance/code-smell findings from the latest review. Scope: correctness hardening (pool lifecycle race, decoder strictness), performance improvements (notification queue and buffer-copy hot paths), and consolidation/simplification (shared backend message dispatch, clearer COPY callback error propagation).
title: Post-review hardening and consolidation pass

acceptance_criteria: Concurrent test proves acquire fails after close even when waiting on semaphore; no permit leak; existing pool tests still pass.
close_reason: Added post-permit close checks in Pool::acquire, wake-on-close semaphore release, and regression test for close-while-waiting acquire
description: Pool acquire currently checks closed only before waiting on the semaphore. If the pool closes while a caller is waiting, acquire can still return a client. Add a post-permit closed recheck, release permit correctly, and ensure blocked acquires fail with PoolError during close.
title: Fix Pool::acquire/Pool::close race that can return clients after close

acceptance_criteria: Malformed length, truncated payload, and unterminated cstring all surface deterministic fatal errors; tests updated to match strict behavior.
close_reason: Made malformed decoder frames fail-fast, enforced unterminated cstring errors, and updated strict decoder regressions
description: Decoder currently skips malformed frames (length too small and payload BufferUnderflow) and BufferReader cstring accepts unterminated strings. Tighten parser behavior to surface protocol errors immediately and trigger deterministic connection-level failure/resync instead of silent skip.
title: Make decoder malformed-frame handling fail-fast and strict

acceptance_criteria: Functional notification tests pass; dequeue path avoids per-pop array rebuild; add regression test for order and high-volume dequeue.
close_reason: Implemented NotificationQueue head-index FIFO with amortized O(1) dequeue and added connection_wbtest high-volume/order regressions
description: Replace notification_queue pop path that rebuilds arrays on each dequeue with an O(1) queue strategy (head index or ring buffer). Preserve FIFO ordering for poll_notifications and wait_for_notification.
title: Refactor notification queue to O(1) FIFO operations

acceptance_criteria: Micro-bench or stress test demonstrates lower allocations or better throughput; protocol tests remain green.
close_reason: Optimized Connection::send_all with pre-sized batch encoding and reduced decoder buffer churn via head-offset + threshold compaction; added stress regression coverage
description: Optimize hot-path buffer handling: avoid repeated full-buffer compaction/copies in Decoder parse, and reduce repeated byte pushing in Connection send_all. Keep protocol semantics unchanged.
title: Reduce allocation churn in decoder and batched writes

acceptance_criteria: Existing behavior preserved; duplicate message-handling code reduced; targeted regression tests cover shared dispatcher semantics.
close_reason: Consolidated backend dispatch through shared classifier/dispatcher and shared ErrorResponse extraction helpers across client/copy/stream/connection paths
description: Introduce shared backend message handling helpers to centralize NotificationResponse, ParameterStatus, ReadyForQuery, and ErrorResponse handling. Remove duplicated match loops where practical without changing behavior.
title: Consolidate backend message dispatch across client, stream, copy, and connection loops

acceptance_criteria: COPY callback error retains original cause or structured wrapping; tests verify typed handling and connection usability after failure.
close_reason: Added structured CopyCallbackError(CopyCallbackFailure) propagation for COPY callbacks while preserving drain-to-ready behavior; updated tests
description: COPY currently stringifies callback errors into CopyError text. Improve error propagation so callers can inspect structured cause while still guaranteeing protocol drain to ReadyForQuery.
title: Preserve structured callback errors in COPY paths

acceptance_criteria: New tests fail before fixes and pass after; CI matrix updated to include these regressions where feasible.
close_reason: Added/updated regressions for pool close-acquire race, strict malformed decoder handling, unterminated cstring rejection, notification queue high-volume FIFO behavior, and dispatch/decoder stress paths
description: Add missing tests for pool close/acquire race, strict malformed frame handling, unterminated cstring handling, and notification queue behavior under volume.
title: Add regression coverage for review-driven hardening/perf changes

close_reason: Extracted shared close closure
description: prepared.mbt lines 79-96: the body of both branches (send Close+Sync, receive_until_ready, check_error) is identical. Only the operation guard differs. Extract the body into a closure.
title: Deduplicate PreparedStatement::close tx_scoped vs non-tx_scoped paths

close_reason: Implemented constant-time comparison with tests
description: scram.mbt:136-139 compares server signatures byte-by-byte with early exit. Crypto comparisons should use constant-time operations to prevent timing side-channels.
title: Use constant-time comparison for SCRAM signature verification

close_reason: Removed redundant check_open() call
description: client.mbt:157 calls self.check_open() but bind_execute() → with_operation() already checks self.closed. The explicit check is redundant.
title: Remove redundant check_open() in Client::query_params

close_reason: Closed
description: Value enum and ~15 helper methods (is_null, as_bool, as_int, etc.) are defined identically in both internal/protocol/types.mbt and value.mbt. TransactionStatus is also duplicated. convert.mbt does a tedious 1:1 variant mapping. The protocol's helpers have subtly different semantics (lossy conversions). Re-export protocol types or define once in shared package. Eliminates ~200 lines.
title: Eliminate duplicate Value enum between protocol and public API

close_reason: wait_for_notification now raises ServerError immediately on ErrorResponse; added unit regression test for helper.
description: Client::wait_for_notification currently ignores non-notification backend messages. Decoder hardening can synthesize ErrorResponse for malformed frames; wait loop must raise ServerError immediately instead of continuing.
title: Treat decoder/protocol ErrorResponse as fatal in wait_for_notification

close_reason: all steps complete
description: Address the latest code review findings across pool lifecycle, transaction/stream concurrency boundaries, COPY safety, UTF-8 correctness, and protocol-loop consolidation/performance. Expand test coverage for both newly introduced behavior and legacy functionality to prevent regressions.
title: Comprehensive hardening + coverage pass (post-review findings)

acceptance_criteria: Pool close/release paths are abort-free under idle, saturated, and concurrent cases; new concurrency tests added; make test-all should pass
close_reason: Reworked pool close wake logic with synthetic permit accounting to avoid semaphore over-release aborts; added regressions for idle close, post-close release accounting, and multi-waiter wake behavior
description: Eliminate semaphore over-release aborts in Pool::close and release-after-close paths. Ensure pool shutdown never crashes regardless of current permit count or in-flight acquires/releases.
title: Fix pool semaphore shutdown/release safety

acceptance_criteria: Unicode round-trip and decode tests added for protocol strings and row values; no mojibake for multibyte UTF-8; make test-all should pass
close_reason: Completed: UTF-8 decoding + regression tests + make test-all passing
description: Replace byte-as-char conversions for cstring/text parsing with UTF-8 decoding semantics where appropriate (protocol strings, text value decoding, notifications, column names, error messages). Preserve strict null-terminator handling and protocol safety checks.
title: Implement UTF-8 correct wire/text decoding

acceptance_criteria: Concurrency tests prove no statement interleaving inside transaction callback and stream auto_tx boundaries; make test-all should pass
close_reason: Completed: transaction/stream exclusivity hardening + fail-fast callback semantics + tests
description: Prevent cross-task statement interleaving during Client::transaction and auto-transaction stream flows. Make transaction boundaries atomic with respect to operation_guard and remove lock gaps around BEGIN/COMMIT in stream setup/close.
title: Enforce transaction and stream operation exclusivity

acceptance_criteria: CopyWriter misuse is rejected; escaping behavior validated for special characters and null semantics; connection remains usable after callback failures; make test-all should pass
close_reason: Completed: COPY writer lifecycle checks, escaping/null support, and regression tests
description: Constrain CopyWriter lifetime to active COPY phases and prevent out-of-phase writes. Update write_row to emit PostgreSQL COPY-safe text (escaping tabs/newlines/backslashes and null representation strategy).
title: Harden COPY writer safety and text-row correctness

acceptance_criteria: batch_size invalid values are rejected with clear errors and tested; default and valid values preserve behavior; make test-all should pass
close_reason: Completed: query_stream batch_size validation and integration coverage
description: Add explicit validation for query_stream batch_size and related guardrails so accidental unlimited fetch behavior cannot bypass streaming memory bounds.
title: Validate streaming backpressure parameters

acceptance_criteria: Duplicate receive-loop branches reduced with shared helpers; targeted regression tests cover consolidated semantics; make test-all should pass
close_reason: Completed: receive-loop state handling consolidated via shared backend dispatch helpers and coverage
description: Unify duplicated message-loop logic in copy/stream/client paths into shared state-machine helpers (dispatch, error accumulation, ReadyForQuery drain semantics) without behavior regressions.
title: Consolidate backend receive-loop state handling

acceptance_criteria: Hot-path allocation profile improves under stress workload; no protocol regressions; make test-all should pass
close_reason: Completed: allocation/perf improvements in decoder/notification/copy paths with regression safety
description: Reduce avoidable copying/allocation in decoder frame parsing, row value extraction, and notification queue compaction/drain paths. Keep protocol correctness and hardening behavior unchanged.
title: Optimize decoder and notification hot-path allocations

acceptance_criteria: Test matrix covers old and new features with deterministic regressions for each reviewed finding; failures reproduce pre-fix behavior where feasible; make test-all should pass
close_reason: Completed: expanded integration/whitebox regression matrix for transaction, stream, COPY, UTF-8, pool, and callback safety; make test-all passing
description: Add thorough white-box and integration coverage for both legacy functionality (CRUD, prepared, transactions, pooling, stream, COPY, notifications, auth/TLS modes) and new hardening behavior. Include concurrency race tests, malformed protocol tests, UTF-8 tests, COPY escaping tests, and stress tests.
title: Expand comprehensive regression matrix (new + legacy features)

acceptance_criteria: Generated/public artifacts are in sync with source; make test-all should pass
close_reason: Completed: ran moon info to sync generated interfaces and validated final gate with make test-all

title: Regenerate public interface/docs and enforce final gate
